Class ShortestPath

java.lang.Object
io.graphite.api.internal.GraphAPI
io.graphite.api.ShortestPath
public final class ShortestPath extends GraphAPI
Provides shortest path algorithms.

The ShortestPath service computes minimum-cost paths between vertices in weighted and unweighted graphs.

Algorithms are selected explicitly by the caller depending on graph characteristics such as edge weights and graph density.

ShortestPathResult result =
        graph.shortestPath().dijkstra(0);

Available Algorithms

  • Dijkstra
  • Bellman-Ford
  • Floyd-Warshall

Typical Applications

  • Network optimization
  • Navigation systems
  • Dependency analysis
Since:
2.0

  • Constructor Details

    • ShortestPath

      public ShortestPath(IGraph graph)

  • Method Details

    • dijkstra

      public ShortestPathResult dijkstra(int source)
      Computes shortest paths using Dijkstra's algorithm.

      This algorithm requires all edge weights to be non-negative.

      Time Complexity: O((V + E) log V)

      Throws:
      InvalidVertexException - if the source vertex is invalid
      NegativeWeightException - if the graph contains negative edge weights
      Since:
      2.0
      See Also:
      • bellmanFord(int)
      • floydWarshall()

    • bellmanFord

      public ShortestPathResult bellmanFord(int source)
      Computes shortest paths using the Bellman-Ford algorithm.

      Unlike Dijkstra's algorithm, Bellman-Ford supports negative edge weights and detects reachable negative-weight cycles.

      Complexity

      • Time: O(VE)
      • Space: O(V)
      Parameters:
      source - the source vertex
      Returns:
      the computed shortest path result
      Throws:
      NullGraphException - if graph is null
      InvalidVertexException - if vertex is invalid
      NegativeCycleException - if the graph contains negative weight cycles
      Since:
      2.0
      See Also:
      • dijkstra(int)

    • floydWarshall

      public AllPairsShortestPathResult floydWarshall()
      Computes the shortest paths between every pair of vertices using the Floyd-Warshall algorithm.

      This algorithm computes all-pairs shortest paths and supports graphs containing negative edge weights, provided there are no negative-weight cycles.

      Complexity

      • Time: O(V³)
      • Space: O(V²)
      Returns:
      AllPairsShortestPathResult
      Throws:
      NegativeCycleException - if the graph contains negative weight cycles
      Since:
      2.0
      See Also:
      • dijkstra(int)
      • bellmanFord(int)
